payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by mem_new and should not be shown as current.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the current, non-superseded memory. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall system selected the non-superseded memory and excluded the superseded predecessor.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old is superseded and therefore excluded from current recall results.

details: Explained that mem_old was filtered due to supersession.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.
